Getting Started with Azure Functions

Azure Functions is a serverless compute service that lets you run event-triggered code without having to explicitly provision or manage infrastructure.

Key Features

  • Pay only for the time your code runs
  • Scale automatically based on demand
  • Support for multiple programming languages including Python, JavaScript, and C#

Creating Your First Function

To create an Azure Function, you can use the Azure CLI, Visual Studio Code, or the Azure Portal. The simplest approach is using the Azure Functions Core Tools:

func init MyFunctionProject --python
func new --name HttpTrigger --template "HTTP trigger"
func start

This creates a new Python-based function app with an HTTP trigger.
